ID: ff07a8fe-1236-3bc9-8785-6dcd529fcca2

The original precipitation radar images of the mentioned weather services are used indirectly. Their data is extracted and processed before the Rain Alarm server generates a new radar image for this app. This means that the radar data displayed by this app might not be the same as of the originating weather service.
